Deferred to v0.2 as part of the v0.1 simplification (see parent epic claude-dev-tools-yt7 and its design-change comment).

Original scope: `/keep-awake on|off|status|gc` slash command depending on `force-on`/`force-off` helper verbs.

For v0.1, manual control is available directly via the `bin/keep-awake` helper (`keep-awake ping` / `keep-awake off` / `keep-awake status`) from any shell. The slash command provides ergonomic surface but is not required for the v0.1 use case.

Revisit in v0.2 once the core plugin is shipping and we have a real signal on whether users actually want in-Claude manual control. If revived, recommend scoping down to status-only first (`/keep-awake` → `keep-awake status`) — see reviewer feedback on parent epic, finding S3.

(--force used because the dependency edge to claude-dev-tools-8ed is stale: this issue is being closed due to scope deferral, not blocked completion.)
Scaffold completed: plugin.json + marketplace entry + bin/hooks dirs. All quality gates pass (jq validation, marketplace lookup). marketplace metadata.version bumped 1.5.0 → 1.6.0.

Helper script implemented and verified. All quality gates pass: bash -n clean, shellcheck clean, all 10+ ticket verification scenarios pass (multi-session, refresh idempotency, zero-gap, TTL expiry, path-traversal block, PID-reuse safety, jq shadowing robustness, non-systemd/missing-jq fallbacks). Smoke-tested live: start spawns inhibitor visible in systemd-inhibit --list with correct annotation, stop removes it cleanly. Deviation: shebang uses /usr/bin/bash absolute path (instead of /usr/bin/env bash) so the ticket's own PATH=/nowhere fallback test works correctly.

hooks.json wired with all 5 events (SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SessionEnd) all with matcher=* and command ending in || true. Valid JSON. Live smoke-tested: SessionStart/PreToolUse/SessionEnd dispatched correctly through helper, inhibitor PID refreshes on each hook (verified PID changed).

README written: 6 sections (What/Install/HowItWorks/Inspect/Config/Troubleshoot), 122 lines, 639 words. jq dependency documented in Install. KEEP_AWAKE_TTL documented in Config & limits. Forbidden-command audit clean (no systemctl suspend/hibernate/poweroff/reboot or loginctl suspend/hibernate). Shell snippets verified live against the real helper.

Verifier ran all 13 scenarios on live system, all PASS. JSON artifacts valid, README forbidden-command audit clean, no defects. Items requiring post-install human verification documented in comment. close-completed.

Epic complete. All implementation tasks (0vo scaffold, 8ed helper, guz hooks, h97 README) closed; slash command (8ry) deferred to v0.2; acceptance review (73f) closed with verifier recommendation close-completed. Plugin keep-awake-linux v0.1.0 shipping in marketplace v1.6.0.

Logging implemented with rotation at 1 MiB. All 9 acceptance scenarios PASS on live system: spawned/refreshed/killed/no-marker/hook-dispatch (2-line)/missing-sid/disable/invalid-sid/rotation. No regression: multi-session aggregation, path-traversal blocking, PID-reuse safety all still pass. Shellcheck clean. plugin.json bumped 0.1.0 → 0.1.1; marketplace metadata 1.6.0 → 1.6.1 and matching keep-awake-linux entry.

Inspect skill shipped + 4 review-driven fixes:
- (Validator critical) hooks.json now uses ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/keep-awake — removes silent-failure risk if bin/ isn't on PATH at hook-execution time
- (Skill FIX #1) STATE_DIR resolution gated on -n check — handles unset XDG_RUNTIME_DIR correctly
- (Skill FIX #2) systemd-inhibit --list parsing broadened — robust across systemd versions
- (Skill IMPROVE #4) Documented that each hook fires 2 log lines; count by verb=start|stop only — prevents 2x overcount
Plus: email fixed gmail (matches other plugins), bin/.gitkeep removed (redundant), description triggers tightened. Plugin bumped 0.1.1 → 0.1.2, marketplace 1.6.1 → 1.6.2. Version sync clean.

Implemented claude-md.sh init|check + 12-case test harness. Atomic-write via mktemp+mv -f in same dir. Duplicate-@AGENTS.md case verified: prepends without removing existing occurrence. All acceptance criteria met. Changes uncommitted per session instructions.

Implemented inventory.py (executable, stdlib-only) + 24-case test harness. Emits raw lines/non_heading_lines counts (no boolean hollow flag per grill Q4). Real-repo run surfaces MONITORING.md missing + 2 non-canonical subdirs (docs/feedback/, docs/rules/). All acceptance criteria met.

Implemented validate-routes.py + 20-case test harness. GitHub anchor algorithm with duplicate-suffix handling. Code-fence/inline-code/prose @-ignore all verified. Skill refs (plugin:skill) opaque-skipped, documented in scripts/README.md (created here; wire-in task will extend). Real-repo run: 7 refs in root, 10 with --include-docs, all resolve. All acceptance criteria met.

Implemented verify.sh + 19-test harness covering pass/fail/no-short-circuit/soft-warnings/arbitrary-CWD. All hard rules met. Discovered a pre-existing bug in claude-md.sh (missing-trailing-newline handling) — filed as separate bug per session rules.

Fixed: replaced 'while IFS= read -r line' with '... || [[ -n "$line" ]]' in first_nonempty_line and the test helper. Added regression test (3 assertions). All 14 tests pass; verify.sh exits 0 against real repo.

Wired scripts into 4 reference docs (docs-init step 5/6, docs-update step 2/6, project-docs-lifecycle Phase 7, project-doc-review-guidelines step 1). Extended scripts/README.md to cover all four scripts + anchor algorithm + skill-ref gap. Added scripts/tests/run-all.sh (4 suites, 77 assertions, all pass). Orchestrator restored 'never overwrites or moves existing content' guardrail dropped by tasker on docs-init/docs-update CLAUDE.md steps. verify.sh exits 0 against repo root.

Verifier APPROVE: all 11 AR criteria pass with direct execution evidence. 77/77 test assertions pass via run-all.sh. verify.sh exits 0 against both marketplace root and examples fixture. 'Never overwrite custom content' guardrail restored on docs-init step 5 and docs-update step 2. Python stdlib-only confirmed. Code-fence/inline-code/prose @-ignore confirmed by fixture tests. Bug 0it fixed with regression test.

Epic complete. All 6 children closed (dtc claude-md.sh, 62i inventory.py, qmd validate-routes.py, 69b verify.sh, 0it bug-fix discovered during 69b, 3yq wire-in). Acceptance review 8q1 APPROVED with full evidence. Four scripts ship at plugins/project-docs/skills/project-docs/scripts/ with 77 passing test assertions and an aggregating run-all.sh runner. verify.sh exits 0 against marketplace root and examples fixture. Reference docs (docs-init, docs-update, project-docs-lifecycle, project-doc-review-guidelines) wired to call scripts at the right phase steps. Changes uncommitted per user instruction.

Tests reorganized to root-level tests/ directory. Per-plugin subdirs created for all 6 plugins (project-docs populated; others empty). project-docs test scripts moved and updated to use REPO_ROOT via git rev-parse --show-toplevel. Per-plugin run-all.sh + top-level tests/run-all.sh + tests/README.md added. Both runners pass: 77 assertions across 4 suites, 1 plugin.

Added test coverage: test-inventory.sh +9 cases (injected_blocks, personal_local), test-validate-routes.sh +4 cases (nothing-to-check message), test-verify.sh +6 cases (--quick, --help, unknown flag, injected-block warning). All 114 tests pass.
Committed in 229eab7 as a standalone change.

Removed BEADS INTEGRATION injected block from AGENTS.md (lines 31-77); deleted 3 stub rules files. verify.sh now passes with only the MONITORING.md soft warning, which is intentional for this repo. The new stub-doc rule was added to project-doc-guidelines.md hard prohibitions + concrete rewrites.

Tightened CLAUDE.md rule across script + skill workflow. claude-md.sh: check fails on extra content; init aborts (exit 2) on extra content; init --rewrite for destructive collapse after migration. Reference docs updated: project-setup.md, project-structure.md, project-docs-lifecycle.md, project-doc-review-guidelines.md, SKILL.md. Workflow refs (docs-init.md, docs-update.md, docs-revise.md) now include an explicit CLAUDE migration step that classifies extra content by destination (AGENTS.md/topic doc/.claude.local.md/delete) and seeks per-edit approval before collapsing. test-claude-md.sh rewritten (29 cases). All 4 test suites pass; verify.sh against this repo still PASS.

Closed without execution after review. See epic comment dated 2026-05-19: the project-docs scripts pattern does not transfer to beads-tasks because bd is already a structured API. Single legitimate candidate (AR task creation) reopened as a fresh standalone task.

Applied new project-docs review-guidelines to this repo's own docs. Originally-named issue (BEADS INTEGRATION injected block in AGENTS.md) was already fixed in 91bce38. Full re-review surfaced 5 BLOCKER + 14 MAJOR + 5 MINOR findings; fixed all 5 BLOCKERs in this pass:
- README.md: added keep-awake-linux row; replaced fabricated 'claude plugin install <url>' with marketplace flow ('/plugin marketplace add hanskohlreiter/claude-dev-tools' + '/plugin install <name>@claude-dev-tools'); corrected enabledPlugins example.
- docs/TESTING.md: added script-tests section pointing at tests/run-all.sh; added external-dependency prereq for plugin-dev:plugin-validator and plugin-dev:skill-reviewer (they ship in anthropics/claude-code's claude-code-plugins marketplace, not this repo).
- docs/RELEASING.md: split Tests gate into (1) bash tests/run-all.sh and (2) plugin-dev:plugin-validator with external-dep note.

Verifier passes (12/12 routes resolved, claude-md OK). Marketplace tests: 31/31 passed.

Deferred MAJOR/MINOR findings split into follow-ups: claude-dev-tools-6lp (OVERVIEW expansion), -bq9 (CHANGE-WORKFLOW reconcile), -pk0 (docs/ orphans), -4mf (CODING fixes), -w3p (RELEASING/TESTING polish), -zvv (README polish).

Implemented. scripts/new-ar-task.sh (66 lines, executable) with proper arg validation + non-epic rejection. planning.md collapsed by 22 lines (heredoc template removed, replaced with one-line pointer at line 52). beads-acceptance-review.md collapsed by 11 lines (example-body section removed, replaced with one-line pointer at line 13). All 9 binary AC verified by orchestrator: script exit codes correct, deterministic strings removed, parent-child dep wired, 4 canonical checkboxes generated. Three E2E test pairs created and closed (2gl/nw9, qcv/v9y, 52c/eus) — no live test artifacts in tracker. Net markdown reduction: 33 lines across 2 reference files.

OVERVIEW.md expanded: repo-level layout block (.claude-plugin/, docs/, plugins/, scripts/, tests/), marketplace.json-vs-plugin.json distinction, single-version-bump statement (sourced from RELEASING.md), plugin-table pointer to README, plugin-tree extended with bin/hooks/themes. .mcp.json deliberately OMITTED — no plugin in this repo currently uses it; principle: don't list forward-looking components in OVERVIEW.md. If a plugin adds .mcp.json later, the OVERVIEW tree should be updated then. 24 insertions / 3 deletions. tests/run-all.sh 129/129.

RELEASING.md build claim reworded (markdown/JSON-only → markdown, JSON, shell scripts, plugin binaries, none require compilation). Validator scope reconciled across TESTING.md + RELEASING.md: plugin-validator is the sole release gate; skill-reviewer is dev-time/non-gate (explicit in TESTING heading + body, parenthetical in RELEASING gate item). Evidence: find returned 10 shell/bin files; no automated validator invocation in scripts/ or tests/. 21 insertions / 4 deletions across 2 files.

CODING.md 4 fixes (F12/F13/F14/F24): step 3 made conditional (rules optional); new step 3 added for marketplace.json registration with exact field list verified against actual file; author added to required plugin.json fields (ground truth: plugins/beads-tasks/.claude-plugin/plugin.json has author; OVERVIEW.md was already correct); 'Check docs/rules/' pointer added at end of rules-files section. 7 insertions / 4 deletions. tests/run-all.sh 129/129.
